title: SHORT-TERM SLEEPING AREA - 211info
text: RIGHT 2 DREAM TOO SHORT-TERM SLEEPING AREA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a tented area for individuals to sleep. Basic sleeping materials are available for those who do not have them. Guests may stay for 12 hours and may return after a 12-hour break. Also offers a clothing closet. Item availability depends on what has been donated and is on hand at any given time. 999 N Thunderbird Way Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with exceptions for legally emancipated teens Hours: Line up and sign up at 5pm. Check in at 9pm. 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (closed Sunday 7am-8pm) Clothing closet: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10am-4pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Do not line up before 5pm. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID of any form, proof of emancipation AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near the Rose Quarter transit center and directly across from the Moda Center's stop on the MAX Yellow Line Services: General Clothing Provision Homeless Drop In Centers Urban Campsites Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RIGHT 2 DREAM TOO
